backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the FIESTA event planning app, defining data types (Event, Booking, OrganizerProfile, Review, etc.) and persistent storage maps, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the OrganizerDashboard page was updated to reorder sections so booking requests appear last, after profile, events, and portfolio image upload.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and recent changes across pages, hooks, and components.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FIESTA React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, guest, organizer, admin) wrapped in a Layout that includes Header, Footer, and a conditional ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsC: Presentational card component that displays a single analytics metric with an icon, label, value, and optional description.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsD: Admin analytics dashboard that fetches organizer and event data to display summary cards for total organizers, total events, most popular event type, and highest-rated organizer.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button using Internet Identity; clears the React Query cache on logout and shows a red destructive style when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that collects a new user's full name and email on first login and saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingR: A modal dialog that allows a guest to select one of their events and send a booking request to a specific organizer, showing success/error feedback and navigating to the bookings page on success.
frontend/src/components/booking/GuestBoo: Renders a list of booking cards for a guest, displaying each booking's status badge, organizer name, and lazily-loaded event details with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/booking/Organize: Displays a single booking request card for an organizer, showing event details and providing approve/reject action buttons that update the booking status via mutation.
Fetches and renders a paginated list of an organizer's bookings, separating pending requests from past bookings and providing previous/next pagination controls.
frontend/src/components/events/CreateEve: A form component that collects event details (type, date, guests, style, contact, description) and submits them to create a new event, with validation preventing past dates.
frontend/src/components/events/DeleteEve: An alert dialog that confirms deletion of an event, handles error cases such as accepted bookings or unauthorized access, and shows a loading state during the delete mutation.
frontend/src/components/events/EditEvent: A modal dialog component that allows users to edit an existing event's details (type, location, guests, style, contact, date, description), pre-filling the form from the event data and submitting updates via the useUpdateEvent hook.
frontend/src/components/events/EventList: Renders a list of event cards showing event details (date, location, guests, style), with edit and delete actions that are locked/disabled if any booking has been approved.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A simple footer component displaying the current year copyright and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: A sticky navigation header with the FIESTA logo, desktop and mobile nav links (My Events, Find Organizers, My Bookings, Organizer Dashboard), and a login button shown only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/organizer/EventP: Displays an organizer's event photos in a responsive grid with hover zoom effect, and opens a keyboard-navigable lightbox when a photo is clicked.
A dialog-based lightbox component that fetches and displays an organizer's event photos with thumbnail strip navigation, keyboard arrow-key support, and a loading/empty state.
A React component that allows organizers to upload and delete event photos, displaying them in a responsive grid with thumbnail previews and upload progress feedback.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Organi: A card component that displays an organizer's profile summary including portfolio images, stats, and availability, with buttons to view their work or open a booking request modal.
A sortable table component that compares multiple organizer profiles by rating or experience, with a booking action button that opens a BookingRequestModal.
A skeleton loading placeholder component that mimics the layout of the organizer dashboard, including sections for profile, booking requests, and portfolio.
A form component for creating or editing an organizer's profile, handling fields like company name, contact, experience, pricing, and availability, with validation and save mutation.
Read-only display component for an organizer's profile, showing stats (experience, reviews, pricing, contact), availability badge, description, and a portfolio gallery.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Portfo: Displays a grid of portfolio thumbnail images with a lightbox dialog for full-size viewing and prev/next navigation, handling broken images gracefully.
UI component for uploading and deleting organizer portfolio images, using file input, mutation hooks, and a thumbnail grid with hover-to-delete overlay.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor, exposing loading and fetched states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, organizer profiles, events, bookings, reviews, and portfolio images.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a navy/gold theme, including light and dark mode color tokens, typography, and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using `clsx` and `tailwind-merge`.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that checks the caller's role and redirects non-admins to the home page, rendering the `AnalyticsDashboard` component for authorized users.
frontend/src/pages/GuestBookings.tsx: Authenticated guest page that fetches and displays the current user's booking requests via `GuestBookingList`, with a skeleton loading state and redirect for unauthenticated users.
Authenticated guest page that shows a form to create new events and a list of the user's existing events side by side, redirecting unauthenticated users to home.
frontend/src/pages/GuestOrganizerBrowsin: Authenticated guest page that fetches and displays all organizer profiles in a grid of `OrganizerCard` components, with a lightbox for viewing event photos.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section, feature cards, and a CTA section; shows a dashboard link for authenticated users or a login prompt for guests.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerBookingManag: Authenticated organizer page that displays incoming booking requests via `OrganizerBookingList` with a back-navigation button to the organizer dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerComparison.t: Authenticated page that reads organizer IDs from URL search params and renders a side-by-side `OrganizerComparisonTable` for the selected organizers.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: Authenticated organizer dashboard that lazily loads portfolio images and event photos via IntersectionObserver, and renders profile view/edit, portfolio upload, event photo upload, and booking list sections.
frontend/src/ui/button.tsx: Defines a reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, etc.) and sizes using class-variance-authority, supporting an asChild prop via Radix UI Slot.
frontend/src/ui/card.tsx: Exports a set of composable Card layout components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction) built with forwardRef and Tailwind utility classes.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Provides helper functions to convert PortfolioImage filenames, EventPhoto blobs, and ExternalBlob objects into displayable URLs, handling HTTP, blob:, and data: URL formats.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with navy and gold color scales, semantic design tokens, border radius, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for an event management platform, recording existing features and a pending action request to move the booking requests section to the bottom of the organiser dashboard.
